prompt: Enhance the resolution of the image and enlarge it. Then, make the light source in the image come from a lower angle, adjust the intensity of light and the shape of shadow accordingly.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Increase the resolution and enlarge the overall composition. Re-illuminate the artwork so that the main light source comes from a lower angle, casting light upwards. Dynamically adjust the light intensity and reshape the shadows on the flowers, vase, and background to realistically reflect this new lighting direction.
